Event: Ghost Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 27/01/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A218
Luck of the Brave

Triggers: 4 sec

Death Protection
When dying, the unit has a 60% chance to be resurrected with 35% health.
Once in a while, the artifact owner gains a shield that absorbs 800000 damage. The shield lasts for 5 sec. Also, all allies in a large radius around the artifact owner take 40% less damage and restore 125000 health every second for 5 sec. If an ally dies during this time, they have a 40% chance to be rorrected with 20% health.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
